section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: How it works
section.p: Pixel events are sent asynchronously after search, category, recommendation, and product-detail renders. Delivery is fire-and-forget through a bounded brxdis-pixel-* thread pool, so page rendering does not wait on p.brsrvr.com/pix.gif and failures are logged then dropped.

section.name: Default behaviour
section.p: Once valid Discovery credentials exist and the site addon is loaded, pixel tracking is enabled by default. No extra production configuration is required.

tr.td: Global hard kill switch for all channels.

section.name: Channel-level overrides

tr.td: Enable or suppress pixel calls for this channel.
Tag this channel's traffic as test data.
Enable debug tagging for this channel.

section.p: The global env/system kill switch always wins over channel settings.

section.name: Verification via logging
section.p: Enable DEBUG logging for the plugin package to confirm emission behaviour.

div.source: DEBUG DiscoveryPixelServiceImpl - Discovery pixel event fired: type=SearchResponse, q=running shoes WARN DiscoveryPixelServiceImpl - Discovery pixel event failed: ...
